description: Bulk material properties for haulage and loading calculations. Densities let payload %, tonnes, and loader bucket m3 reconcile; swell (bulking) converts in-situ bank volume to loose hauled volume; fill factor is the typical loader-bucket fill for the material. The pipeline now consumes loose density: the selected material's loose_density_tpm3 is converted to kg/m3 and written to the des_inputs.json material catalog and schedule (default copper_ore, selectable via the export config 'material' field). Swell and fill factor remain reference-only for now; payload is still tracked as a percentage/tonnage (per-truck payload_tonnes tonnage is a future step).

units.bank_density_tpm3: in-situ (bank) density, tonnes per cubic metre
units.loose_density_tpm3: loose (broken/hauled) density, tonnes per cubic metre
units.swell_pct: bulking on excavation, percent (loose volume vs bank volume)
units.fill_factor_pct: typical loader bucket fill factor for the material, percent

materials.name: copper_ore
materials.notes: porphyry copper ~35% swell; harder ore higher

materials.name: iron_ore
materials.notes: wide range by ore type (hematite up to ~5.1 t/m3)

materials.name: gold_ore
materials.notes: treat as hard rock; varies with host rock
